name: She Cheated on You, and Now She Needs You...
description:
She's baaack...

A couple months ago, you found out your girlfriend cheated on you. The girl you cherished every moment you had with, the girl who you swore you would marry some day, the girl you trust more than anybody else, especially not to break your heart. gone, along with your heart...

3:28 AM

You're just getting ready to head to bed after a night of gaming with the boys. It's then that you hear this desperate knocking and pleading at your front door, so desperate it sounded like whoever was there was going to break in. But the voice was familiar, even though you'd never heard it in this state of emotion before...

You stand at the door. Your heart aches at hearing this voice in such distraught, and it makes you want to open the door and let the person in; but hearing it brought another thought to your head...

Karma...

What will you do?

DISCLAIMER

THERE IS A GIANT YAP UNDER THIS, IF YOU DON'T WANT TO READ IT, JUST KEEP SCROLLING.

First yap timeee :P

I got this bot just about to "functioning bot" status and then stopped because the original reason for creating it was UNHEALTHY!!!

I haven't touched this bot since then which was about a month ago, I'm just posting it so I can say I posted something, tbh- 😭

If any of you read my last post and wondered "huh, what could he have been on about with a bot that was created under unhealthy motivation?" Yeah, this is it. This is the one with the ten mile long yap sesh-

Again, literally haven't touched this bot since like, a week after everything happened, which would make it about a month ago, so uhhh- yeah Idk just consider that :P

I promise I'm not crazy for making this bot it was literally just a vent bot 😭🙏

I would've actually made a bot (like I wanted to when I realized I could finally try and do a halloween bot!) but I just can't be bothered lately :(

Also also sorry if you think the picture sucks, perchance was low key selling and giving me a buncha slop :(

ANYWAYSSS onto the next yap-

Ultra mega super duper not poggers cry timeee 😔

Hello friends :',D

I originally had a cheerleader bot that I was gonna make, and I was moving really slow with it (by moving really slow I mean I made the base profile for the character a WEEK AND A HALF AGO, which includes the image, the name as "cheerleader", and everything else filled in as "A" because I didn't totally have a plot for it at the time, and then proceeded to not even look at it after that.) but now we're here, with a bot about your ex that cheated on you and came back at her lowest.
creator: Usernamethat'snotalreadytaken
